closeoutRule: Do not repeat, scale, archive, or hand off the pilot until closeout checks, evidence ledger, deletion/retention proof, official boundary, and proceed/hold/no-go decision are recorded.
publicSafetyRule: This public v3.0 closeout package is fake/sample only. It must not collect or expose real closeout records, private pilot evidence, incident details, access needs, official Toastmasters records, payment details, member numbers, or authority records.
noGoTriggers: Pilot repeats, scales, or hands off without closeout decision evidence.
Private closeout evidence, incident details, access needs, official Toastmasters records, payment details, member numbers, or authority records appear in the public package.
Records inventory, deletion proof, retention reason, access revocation, or withdrawal/correction resolution is missing.
Supporters, sponsors, or public reviewers receive member data, access needs, incidents, official records, or unrestricted private access.
A second pilot opens using old consent, old gates, or old public wording.
Community authority is implied by repository maintainers or developer custody instead of the approved authority pathway.

sourceAnchors.label: Maiam nayri Wingara Indigenous Data Sovereignty

closeoutChecks.evidence: Named person can close, hold, or extend the pilot
closeoutChecks.noGo: Pilot ends without accountable closeout owner

closeoutChecks.check: Controlled intake closed or extended by record
closeoutChecks.evidence: Private intake status, date, and next route
closeoutChecks.noGo: Contacts continue entering without current notice or authority

closeoutChecks.evidence: Record count by class, owner, and retention rule
closeoutChecks.noGo: Team cannot prove what was collected

closeoutChecks.evidence: Resolution log with response time and result
closeoutChecks.noGo: Open request has no owner or result

closeoutChecks.evidence: Delete, retain, or handoff action for each data class
closeoutChecks.noGo: Records kept without reason or review date

closeoutChecks.evidence: Named access review and removal evidence
closeoutChecks.noGo: Private access remains open after closeout without approval

closeoutChecks.evidence: Private status of official process and documents outside package
closeoutChecks.noGo: Official forms, member numbers, signatures, or payment records enter public package

closeoutChecks.evidence: Private incident closeout, escalation, or hold decision
closeoutChecks.noGo: Open incident lacks pause or closure decision

closeoutChecks.evidence: Support records deleted, minimised, or retained with reason
closeoutChecks.noGo: Access needs appear in public evidence

closeoutChecks.evidence: Screenshot and summary review before publishing
closeoutChecks.noGo: Public summary can identify a person or private circumstance

closeoutChecks.evidence: Confirmed founder pathway and official boundary
closeoutChecks.noGo: Supporters or demo-first attendees counted as confirmed founders

closeoutChecks.evidence: Supporter access and sponsorship boundary check
closeoutChecks.noGo: Supporters receive member or access-need data

closeoutChecks.evidence: Workload, response clocks, and one-person dependency review
closeoutChecks.noGo: Scale proceeds while response clocks rely on one person
Participants do not know closeout result or their data options

closeoutChecks.evidence: Proceed, hold, or no-go meeting and agenda
closeoutChecks.noGo: Second pilot starts without decision record

closeoutChecks.evidence: Backlog, risks, evidence, owners, and next build path
Proceed, hold, no-go, archive, or second pilot decision
closeoutChecks.noGo: Pilot drifts into wider rollout without closeout decision

decisionOptions.useWhen: All required closeout checks pass and operator load is sustainable
decisionOptions.evidence: Closeout record, learning metrics, no-go review, and approval
decisionOptions.publicRule: Proceed status and public-safe learning only
decisionOptions.noGo: No deletion or access closeout evidence

decisionOptions.useWhen: Useful signal exists but one or more closeout controls remain unresolved
decisionOptions.evidence: Named hold actions, owner, due date, and recheck date
decisionOptions.noGo: Hold has no owner or review date

decisionOptions.useWhen: No-go trigger occurred or the pilot cannot safely continue
decisionOptions.evidence: No-go record, deletion/retention proof, and participant closeout
decisionOptions.publicRule: No-go status and public-safe reason only

decisionOptions.useWhen: Real pilot is not ready, but public fake/sample review remains useful
decisionOptions.evidence: Public demo backlog and safety boundary
decisionOptions.noGo: Public page implies real intake is open

decisionOptions.option: Move official Toastmasters pathway outside package
decisionOptions.useWhen: Founder path needs official process outside Governance Commons public files
decisionOptions.evidence: Official handoff status stored privately or externally
decisionOptions.noGo: Official records stored in public demo

decisionOptions.useWhen: Pilot evidence supports a private Decidim environment beyond static public demo
decisionOptions.evidence: Hosting, roles, backups, privacy, and migration plan
decisionOptions.noGo: Static public demo becomes private system of record

decisionOptions.useWhen: Scale requires external Decidim hosting or implementation capacity
decisionOptions.evidence: Scope, acceptance, privacy, source code, and handover requirements
decisionOptions.noGo: Provider asks for real private pilot data during quote

decisionOptions.useWhen: Any wider First Nations use needs authority beyond developer custody
decisionOptions.evidence: Authority pathway, consultation scope, and decision rights
Redaction QA and aggregate-only public note
decisionOptions.noGo: Identities or private circumstances can be inferred

decisionOptions.useWhen: Another organisation or group should operate the next stage
decisionOptions.evidence: Ownership, admin, data, and authority transfer record
decisionOptions.noGo: Ownership changes without data and access handover

decisionOptions.useWhen: Pilot ends or pauses and records need closeout proof
decisionOptions.evidence: Archive index, deletion evidence, retention reasons, and review date

decisionOptions.useWhen: Learning supports future broader interest but not immediate scale
decisionOptions.evidence: New notice, new authority, refreshed support capacity
decisionOptions.noGo: Wider EOI opens on old consent and old gates

evidenceLedger.closeoutAction: Map every data class to delete, retain, or handoff
Retain proof privately for review period
Close, escalate, or keep pilot on hold
Keep official records outside public package
Publish only if sample size is safe

evidenceLedger.storage: Private record plus redacted public note
evidenceLedger.publicRule: Proceed, hold, or no-go summary only

transitionBacklog.action: Confirm community authority pathway beyond developer custody
transitionBacklog.stopCondition: Scale proceeds by repository maintainer decision only

transitionBacklog.action: Run data governance and Indigenous Data Sovereignty review
transitionBacklog.stopCondition: Data classes lack owner or purpose

transitionBacklog.action: Complete privacy impact review for wider pilot
Review moderation, incident, and meeting conduct rules
Choose private hosting or Decidim environment for next stage
transitionBacklog.stopCondition: Public static demo used for private records

transitionBacklog.action: Map closeout learning to Decidim spaces and components

transitionBacklog.stopCondition: Intake cannot support withdrawal or correction

transitionBacklog.action: Convert sample into repeatable First Nations organisation join pattern
transitionBacklog.stopCondition: Pattern collects real org records publicly

transitionBacklog.action: Set access support and participant support capacity
Update incident response and pause process
transitionBacklog.stopCondition: No escalation path for next stage
Funding request lacks evidence and boundaries
Only one person can operate the system

transitionBacklog.action: Automate archive/deletion checklist for future pilots
Define second controlled pilot recruitment conditions
transitionBacklog.stopCondition: Wider EOI opens before closeout gates pass
